prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年物理类（含旧高考理科）最低位次约18806→18885→20321→37428，整体呈后移趋势，尤其2025年因新高考选科分组（再选不限组位次大幅后移至37428 ），近两年累计后移约17000名；2025年基准位次约37428名；该校在四川省物理类招生计划2022年102人、2023年117人、2024年114人、2025年123人，呈逐年小 幅扩招趋势；2026年计划145人，较2025年扩招22人（增幅约17.9%），扩招幅度较大，一定程度上缓解竞争压力但总体报考人数增加使竞争仍趋激烈。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 长 安大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第89名（2025年第84名），排名略有下滑但仍属中上水平211，在交通、土木、机械等工科领域有较强行业认可度；2026年声誉评价数据中未见长安大学相关负面舆情；抖音热度排名第83（综合热度277458），评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量在211高校中处于中等偏下水平，未出现明 显热度飙升或断档信号；交通运输工程为A-学科（第五轮评估），是该校唯一A类学科，在道路桥梁、交通工程等领域具有显著行业优势；车辆工程、机械类等 关联专业受益于该学科辐射，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年高热推荐）；土木 建筑类热度明显分化/劝退；该校招生专业中道路桥梁与渡河工程、交通运输等特色专业与A-学科直接关联，报考热度相对稳定；四川省2026年普通高考总人数约535000人（仅总 人数），按2025年历史类/物理类比例估算，物理类考生约329239人，较2025年284789人增加约15.6%，竞争加剧；长安大 学位于陕西西安，距四川较近，交通便利，是四川考生报考外省211的热门选择之一；该校在四川物理类招生计划145人，招生规模较大，表明对四川生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招（+22人）与四川考生总数显著增加（+15.6%）的叠加效应，以及软科排名略降、抖音热度一般等因素，考虑考生规模扩大带来的竞争加剧，预测2026年物理类最低位次约41644名，区间41144–42144名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including old Gaokao Science) were approximately 18806 → 18885 → 20321 → 37428, showing an overall backward trend. Especially in 2025, due to the new Gaokao subject grouping (the group with no re-selection requirements saw a significant backward shift to 37428), the cumulative backward shift over the past two years is about 17,000 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 37428. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Sichuan was 102 in 2022, 117 in 2023, 114 in 2024, and 123 in 2025, showing a gradual slight expansion. The 2026 plan is 145, an increase of 22 (about 17.9%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, alleviating competition pressure to some extent, but the overall increase in the number of applicants still makes competition intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 89th in 2026 (84th in 2025), with a slight decline but still at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. It has strong industry recognition in fields such as transportation, civil engineering, and mechanical engineering. In 2026 reputation evaluation data, no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University was found. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (comprehensive popularity 277458), rated as 'average', with short video exposure at a lower-middle level among 211 universities, showing no obvious surge in popularity or signal of a gap. Transportation Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A-class discipline of the university, with significant industry advantages in road and bridge, transportation engineering, etc. Related majors such as Vehicle Engineering and Mechanical Engineering benefit from the radiation of this discipline, attracting some candidates interested in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity (highly recommended in 2024). Civil and Architectural majors show clear differentiation/discouragement. Among the university's enrollment majors, characteristic majors like Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering and Transportation are directly related to the A- discipline, with relatively stable application popularity. The total number of ordinary Gaokao examinees in Sichuan in 2026 is about 535,000 (total only). Estimated based on the 2025 ratio of History Category to Physics Category, Physics Category examinees are about 329,239, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 284,789 in 2025, intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, close to Sichuan with convenient transportation, making it a popular choice for Sichuan candidates applying for out-of-province 211 universities. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Sichuan is 145, a relatively large scale, indicating its emphasis on Sichuan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the historical backward trend in rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+22), and the notable increase in the number of Sichuan examinees (+15.6%), along with factors such as a slight decline in Soft Science ranking and average Douyin popularity, and the intensified competition due to the expanded examinee pool, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 41644, with a range of 41144–42144.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (41144–42144), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 majors as a sprint choice, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. Tier 1 Engineering Pilot Classes (Huawei Class/Future Transportation) and Electrical, Electronic Information majors typically have admission rankings in the 13000–16000 range, requiring a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the predicted range to attempt. Tier 2 majors such as Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Vehicle Engineering have rankings around 15000–20000, offering the best cost-performance ratio. Tier 3 majors such as Logistics Management, Business Administration, and Architecture have rankings after 24000, suitable as a safety net.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including old Gaokao liberal arts) were approximately 3898 → 3828 → 4213 → 5148, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend. In 2025, it shifted back by about 935 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative shift of about 1320 places over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5148. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan Province for History Category was 9 students in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12 students, a reduction of 3 students (a 20% decrease) compared to 2025, indicating a significant reduction in enrollment and increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chang'an University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 89th on the Soft Science main list. It is known for its strength in engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. Overall, its liberal arts strength is at a medium level among 211 universities. In the 2026 reputation evaluation, no negative public opinion related to Chang'an University was found. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 83rd (comprehensive popularity 277458), rated as 'average', with no obvious abnormal popularity signals. The university's liberal arts majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration, English, Japanese, Administrative Management, etc.) have low correlation with its A- discipline of Transportation Engineering, and liberal arts are not its traditional strength areas.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature tends to be recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Business Administration shows divided and wait-and-see attitudes. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Sichuan Province is about 205,761, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 177,978 in 2025, intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, relatively close to Sichuan, making it a common choice for Sichuan examinees applying to out-of-province 211 universities. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Sichuan is 12 students, a moderate scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the combined effects of the historical downward trend in rankings, the reduction of 3 students (20%) in 2026, and the significant increase in the total number of Sichuan examinees (15.6%), along with factors such as liberal arts not being a strength area of Chang'an University, and the intensified competition due to the expanded examinee pool, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 4560, with a range of 4060–5060.
